purchase.description: Purchase of residential property at 27 Willow Lane, Sale, M33 5RT

sof_explanation: The funds for this purchase are coming from the sale of my previous property at 42 Oakwood Drive, Chorlton, Manchester M20 4QP. The property was sold for £425,000 with net proceeds of £269,280 after deducting the mortgage redemption and associated fees. The completion took place on 15 October 2025, handled by Harrison & Co Solicitors.

claims.description: Sale of 42 Oakwood Drive, Chorlton, Manchester M20 4QP - net proceeds after mortgage redemption and fees
